name: WW INTERNATIONAL, INC.
business: WW International, Inc. provides subscriptions for weight management programs. Its Behavioral business offers digital product offerings with optional access to workshops. Its Clinical business offers subscriptions that include access to clinicians who can prescribe weight loss medications, combined with digital and workshop offerings.
sellsTo: employers via Weight Watchers for Business

exposures.sentence: Our app delivers our programs by providing tools, education, nutrition and wellness resources, along with access to our virtual member community.

In addition, our digital platform provides our U.S. members access to a network of licensed, specialized healthcare professionals including board-certified doctors and clinicians trained in obesity medicine who can prescribe a comprehensive formulary of medications, including both the oral and injectable versions of GLP-1 medications, to eligible members through Weight Watchers-affiliated practices.
These include our AI-powered Food Tracker and Recipe Analyzer, which instantly estimates and tracks ingredients, portions, and Points based upon a photo or recipe s website address.
